name: Perfect Contextual Hydration
description: The seamless, frictionless injection of absolute ground truth into the cognitive reasoning loop. The cognitive actors possess the exact, perfect subset of universal state required to make a flawless decision at any given millisecond, with zero hallucinations.
successCriteria:
1. The Architect and Engineer never ask "What is the status of X?"
2. The system automatically hydrates their prompts with real-time, mathematically verified state (via `get_pending_actions` or Semantic Code Search) *before* they generate a single token.
3. Architect Amnesia (Idea-28) is permanently eliminated.
